fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Aluminum Clad Windows?

‍Classic to Bold Color Options

‍From natural shades to vibrant colors, an extensive portfolio of 46 exterior colors allows you to truly set your project apart.‍

Maximize Daylighting 

Experience more natural light and wide open views with a large glass area.

Design Flexibility

Solid wood interiors can be stained or painted to match other finishes inside the home. Choose matching hardware or decorative metallic finishes to beautifully complement a home’s drawer pulls, faucets and lighting.

Built to Last

‍Durable extruded aluminum exterior protects wood from the elements while offering low maintenance and long-lasting beauty.

Reduced Energy Costs

‍Enjoy reduced energy costs and year-round comfort with advanced glass packages that provide up to four times the energy efficiency of clear, single-glazed glass.

Insect and Moisture-resistance

‍Solid wood is vacuum-treated to resist rotting and water damage for years of dependable beauty and performance.

Charming Curb Appeal

‍Architecturally inspired grille profiles and patterns allow you to accentuate a home’s design.

‍

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Vinyl Windows?

Energy Efficient

‍Vinyl windows offer top thermal performance, keeping your home comfortable year-round. Unlike aluminum, vinyl doesn’t transfer heat or cold, helping lower your energy bills and carbon footprint.

Durable & Long-Lasting

‍Built to last, vinyl windows resist wear and weather without frequent repairs or replacements. Their long lifespan means less waste and fewer resources used.

Low Maintenance & Eco-Friendly

‍No painting or sealing needed—just clean with soap and water. Vinyl is made from recyclable PVC, a material derived from salt, making it more sustainable than wood, which requires tree harvesting and chemical processing.

Smart for You & the Planet

Vinyl windows are energy-saving, low-maintenance, and better for the environment. If you're looking for eco-friendly windows tailored to your climate, Earthwise Windows has you covered. Contact an Earthwise specialist today to learn more.
fieldData.property-listing---summary: Vinyl windows are built for efficiency, affordability, and ease. Made from durable PVC, these windows deliver long-term performance with virtually no upkeep. They're perfect for families, rentals, and modern homes looking for reliable value.
fieldData.property-listing---excerpt: Vinyl frames are made from PVC, a low-maintenance and durable material.
fieldData.warrantytext: Full lifetime transferable warranty on parts and labor

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Wood Clad Windows?

Interior Elegance

Enjoy real wood finishes—painted or stained to your preference—for a refined look inside. They elevate any room with texture, warmth, and timeless appeal.

Exterior Durability

The cladding resists rain, UV rays, wind, and snow, meaning less upkeep and a longer lifespan. You won’t need to repaint or repair the outside—ever.

Energy Efficiency + Performance

Wood-clad windows combine excellent insulation with long-term durability. They're a smart solution for high-performance homes that want both comfort and character.
fieldData.property-listing---summary: Wood-clad windows offer the best of both worlds. On the interior, you get the warmth and elegance of natural wood. On the exterior, a protective cladding (vinyl, aluminum, or fiberglass) shields your windows from the weather.
fieldData.property-listing---excerpt: The warmth of natural wood inside with durable, low-maintenance exteriors.

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Fiberglass Windows?

Superior Strength & Longevity

Fiberglass frames are 8x stronger than vinyl and won’t flex or sag over time. They’re built to endure harsh weather, extreme temperatures, and years of everyday use.

Energy-Saving Performance

These windows seal tight, keeping out drafts and reducing energy loss. Combined with Low-E glass, they help stabilize indoor temps and lower your monthly bills.

Custom Wood Look — Without the Maintenance

Fiberglass can be painted and even textured to resemble real wood, giving you the design you want with none of the upkeep.
fieldData.property-listing---summary: Fiberglass windows excel in durability, resisting swelling, cracking, and warping in any climate. Their sleek design suits both traditional and modern homes.

fieldData.property-listing---about:
Why Choose Aluminum Windows?

Ultra-Narrow Sightlines

Steel's strength allows for the slimmest window frames on the market. This creates a sleek, open look with more glass, more light, and more elegance.

Built Like a Fortress

If safety and longevity matter most, steel is unbeatable. It’s virtually impossible to warp, rot, or break, offering the highest level of protection for your home.

Distinctive Style

Steel windows bring a timeless, industrial-chic aesthetic to any space. They complement both vintage and modern interiors with bold lines and unmatched presence.
fieldData.property-listing---summary: Aluminum windows offer a clean, contemporary look with outstanding durability. These frames are ultra-strong but lightweight, perfect for expansive glass panels and wide-open views.

Built Like a Fortress

If safety and longevity matter most, steel is unbeatable. It’s virtually impossible to warp, rot, or break, offering the highest level of protection for your home.

Distinctive Style

Steel windows bring a timeless, industrial-chic aesthetic to any space. They complement both vintage and modern interiors with bold lines and unmatched presence.
